title: Hydration isn’t complicated: Just drink water
summary: This wellness guide advises that plain water is usually sufficient for most people during summer heat, despite sports drinks like Powerade being marketed as hydration solutions. The article addresses practical hydration needs as multiple regions experience extreme heat waves.
content:
Powerade is appropriate for World Cup athletes, but unless you’re also sweating buckets, water is usually enough. | Photo: Megan Briggs / Getty Images	

This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here.
Europe is melting, the eastern US is currently trapped in a "heat dome," the Midwest has the corn sweats to look forward to, and if you've never felt the oppressive, sticky misery of monsoon season in Asia - consider yourself blessed. But as folks duke it out on social media about who has it hotter (and whether air conditioning is ethical), it's time to address a nonnegotiable truth of surviving summer: hydration.
Surely, stayi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 补水很简单：只需喝水
zh.summary: 本指南建议，尽管佳得乐等运动饮料被作为补水解决方案进行营销，但普通水通常对大多数人在夏季炎热中就足够了。该文章讨论了实际的补水需求，因为多个地区经历极端热浪。

title: Anthropic wants to develop its own drugs
summary: Anthropic announced Claude Science, an AI workbench that consolidates fragmented scientific tools and datasets for researchers, while also stating it would develop its own pharmaceutical drugs. The move positions AI as a catalyst for accelerating scientific discovery and drug development.
content:
At the event "The Briefing: AI for Science" earlier this week, Anthropic announced Claude Science, a new "AI workbench for scientists" that pulls fragmented tools and datasets into one environment, and generates figures and visuals. Anthropic, already dominating the industry with its popular coding tools and powerful AI models, framed the launch around what it says is AI's potential to "dramatically accelerate the pace of scientific discovery and the development of healthcare interventions," and touted a long list of biotech and pharma customers already using Claude. 
Anthropic also went a step further, saying it would develop drugs of its  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic 想要开发自己的药物
zh.summary: Anthropic 宣布推出 Claude Science，这是一个为研究人员整合分散的科学工具和数据集的 AI 工作台，同时声称将开发自己的制药药物。这一举措将 AI 定位为加速科学发现和药物开发的催化剂。

title: Jon Prosser responds to Apple lawsuit by blaming the other guy
summary: YouTuber Jon Prosser filed a legal response to Apple's trade secret lawsuit, admitting he recorded unreleased iOS software and accepted revenue from leaked content but denying any conspiracy. He shifted blame to the other defendant for the unauthorized disclosures.
content:
YouTuber Jon Prosser has finally filed a formal response to Apple's lawsuit made against him and another defendant over allegedly stealing iOS secrets. In his response, Prosser denied that he "planned or participated in any conspiracy or coordinated scheme" for the "purpose of injuring Apple." However, Prosser admitted to recording a FaceTime call showing unreleased iOS software and sharing revenue from his YouTube videos about the leaks with the person who showed him the information. Prosser also argued that the other defendant "is completely responsible" for the alleged disclosure of trade secrets.
Last July, Apple claimed in its lawsuit  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Jon Prosser 通过指责他人回应苹果诉讼
zh.summary: YouTuber Jon Prosser 对苹果的商业机密诉讼提交了法律回应，承认他录制了未发布的 iOS 软件并接受了泄露内容的收入，但否认有任何共谋。他将未授权披露的责任转向了另一被告。

title: The Verge’s annual summer ‘in’ and ‘out’ list
summary: The Verge released its annual summer trends list, cataloging what's culturally "in" and "out" for the season across technology and lifestyle categories. The curated list reflects current attitudes within the tech industry and broader pop culture.
content:
In the AI slop-loaded, algorithm-powered modern reality, trends come and go - and the tech industry is no different. For the last few years, The Verge staff has compiled a selection of things that are IN for summer and OUT for summer - and each time there are some strong feelings. (Here are the last two years' predictions.) Let's do it again!
Mia Sato, senior report

INOUT

Motion sickness glassesAI "pervert" glasses
FiberProtein
Bootleg sports merchOfficial tech company merch
Floating in waterTouching grass


Meredith Haggerty, editor

INOUT

 The great New York renaissanceThe Great American State Fair
The Knicks garbage canTaylor Swift's MSG weddi …


Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: The Verge 年度夏季"流行"与"过时"榜单
zh.summary: The Verge 发布了其年度夏季趋势榜单，列举了在科技和生活方式领域中文化上"流行"和"过时"的内容。这份精心策划的榜单反映了科技行业和广泛流行文化中的当前态度。

title: Inside the Luddite festival harnessing Gen Z’s rage against Big Tech
summary: New York City's Summer of Ludd festival is teaching attendees how to live offline and resist technology culture, tapping into Gen Z's growing frustration with Big Tech dominance. The event represents a broader cultural pushback against constant digital connectivity.
content: New York City’s Summer of Ludd festival is teaching people how to live offline.

zh.title: 走进卢德派音乐节：利用Z世代对大科技的愤怒
zh.summary: 纽约市的"卢德之夏"音乐节教参与者如何离线生活并抵制科技文化，利用Z世代对大科技主导地位日益增长的挫折感。该活动代表了对持续数字连接更广泛的文化反对。

title: Apple TV is hitting its stride
summary: After years of focusing on quality over quantity, Apple TV released a particularly strong 2026 lineup that has finally validated its selective content strategy. The streaming service's approach now draws comparisons to HBO's heyday of prestige programming.
content:
Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed. | Image: Apple	

Since its inception, Apple TV, née Apple TV Plus, has built a reputation on quality over quantity. It has far fewer shows and movies than the likes of Netflix or Disney Plus, but generally speaking, the projects it does put out are quite good. It's a strategy that has brought comparisons to the HBO of old, and 2026 has featured a particularly strong mix of new hits and returning favorites. It took a few years, but Apple TV seems to be finally hitting its stride.
In terms of brand-new series, this year's offerings have been fairly spread out across genres. Leading the way has been the delightful Widow's Bay, which skillfully manages the diff …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Apple TV 势头正劲
zh.summary: 经过多年专注于质量而非数量的策略后，Apple TV 推出了一个特别强大的2026年内容阵容，终于验证了其精选内容战略。这项流媒体服务的方法现在与HBO声誉编程的黄金时代相提并论。

title: A behind-the-scenes look at Midjourney’s medical scanner leaves many questions unanswered
summary: Midjourney released a behind-the-scenes video of its experimental ultrasound scanner designed for medical imaging and spa deployment, revealing a prototype built from repurposed ultrasound probes and consumer hardware. The tour raises questions about the device's actual clinical viability and effectiveness.
content:
A scan of an imaging phantom, segmented to validate how cleanly structures separate under controlled conditions. | Image: Midjourney Medical	

Midjourney has shown more of its futuristic medical scanner. It still hasn't shown much proof it works. 
The AI startup, best known for generating images, released a behind-the-scenes video of its dunk-tank ultrasound scanner, which it plans to deploy in spas and hopes will transform medicine with cheap, detailed, radiation-free imaging. The nearly 20-minute tour comes from tech YouTuber Marcin Plaza, who also happens to be an engineer at the company.
Plaza frankly describes the scanner as scores of ultrasound probes "hacked apart and slapped on a glorified hot tub with an elevator in it," connected to off-the-shelf computers and Raspberry …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Midjourney医疗扫描仪幕后揭秘留下许多未解的问题
zh.summary: Midjourney发布了其实验性超声波扫描仪的幕后视频，该设备设计用于医学成像和水疗部署，视频揭示了一个由翻新的超声波探头和消费级硬件组成的原型。这次演示引发了人们对该设备实际临床可行性和有效性的疑问。

title: Despite the darkness, I still see signs of hope in America
summary: This opinion piece reflects on America's current challenges and societal struggles while maintaining an outlook on potential recovery. The author explores the difficulty of pinpointing when the country began its recent decline.
content: It's difficult to pinpoint the moment in my life where America started to lose the plot.

zh.title: 尽管黑暗笼罩，我仍在美国看到希望的曙光
zh.summary: 这篇评论文章反思了美国当前面临的挑战和社会困境，同时对潜在复苏保持乐观展望。作者探讨了确定该国何时开始近期衰退的困难。

title: Visiting the stars (and planets, and telescopes) in VR
summary: A new VR experience allows users to explore stars, exoplanets, and major astronomical observatories from an immersive first-person perspective. The walkthrough makes space exploration and celestial science accessible to general audiences.
content: Walkthrough experience includes visits to stars, exoplanets, and observatories.

zh.title: 在虚拟现实中探访星星、行星和望远镜
zh.summary: 一项新的虚拟现实体验让用户能够从沉浸式第一人称视角探索恒星、系外行星和主要天文观测站。这次体验让太空探索和天文科学对普通观众也变得触手可及。

title: Wing Commander IV and the FMV future that never quite was
summary: This retrospective examines Wing Commander IV's use of full-motion video, where director Chris Roberts essentially created an entire movie within the game format. The piece explores the FMV gaming phenomenon of the era and why the trend ultimately failed to sustain.
content: C:\ArsGames takes a look at the time Chris Roberts more or less made a whole movie.

zh.title: 《翼骑士4》与未曾实现的FMV未来
zh.summary: 这篇回顾性文章考察了《翼骑士4》对全动态视频的运用,导演克里斯·罗伯茨本质上在游戏格式内制作了一部完整电影。文章探讨了那个时代的FMV游戏现象,以及为什么这一趋势最终未能持续下去。

title: Politician who investigated spyware abuses had his phone hacked with Pegasus spyware
summary: NSO Group's Pegasus spyware was used by a government customer to hack a European politician who was serving on an EU committee investigating the spyware industry. The case underscores the serious security risks posed by commercial surveillance tools and the irony of targeting those charged with regulatory oversight.
content: A government customer of NSO Group used the company's Pegasus spyware to hack into the phone of a European politician, who at the time was serving on an EU committee tasked with investigating the spyware industry.

zh.title: 调查间谍软件滥用行为的政治家手机被飞马间谍软件入侵
zh.summary: NSO集团的飞马间谍软件被一个政府客户用来入侵一名欧洲政治家的手机，该政治家当时担任欧盟委员会关于调查间谍软件行业的成员。该案例强调了商业监视工具带来的严重安全风险，以及针对负责监管监督人员的讽刺性。

title: Sony’s PlayStation disc factory is already being repurposed
summary: The video game disc is dead, and Sony's been planning to kill it for some time, according to a report out of Austria. The man who leads Sony's discmaking operations, Sony DADC president Dietmar Tanzer
content:
The video game disc is dead, and Sony's been planning to kill it for some time, according to a report out of Austria. The man who leads Sony's discmaking operations, Sony DADC president Dietmar Tanzer, told ORF Salzburg that the company's Thalgau plant produces 600,000 discs every day, half of which are for PlayStation. But since it'll only be making 10 percent of that volume in 2028, it's planning to retrain all 300 employees to work on optical microlenses instead.
Thalgau isn't just one of Sony's disc plants. It's where the disc-making division is headquartered, and appears to be its only remaining wholly owned disc manufacturing facility …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼的PlayStation光盘工厂正在被重新利用
zh.summary: 根据奥地利的报告，电子游戏光盘已经死亡，索尼早就计划淘汰它。领导索尼光盘制造业务的索尼DADC总裁迪特玛·坦泽尔

summary: If you're going to apply for Startup Battlefield Australia, now is the time. Applications close July 6, and once the deadline passes, the opportunity is gone.
content: If you're going to apply for Startup Battlefield Australia, now is the time. Applications close July 6, and once the deadline passes, the opportunity is gone.
